summary: Cybersecurity attack path visualizer application with draggable icon toolbar
architectural_notes: Using Lucide React icon library for consistent, modern icon design
Drag-and-drop functionality for adding nodes to attack path diagrams

existing_features.title: Add Lucide React icons for Backdoor/Virus, Phishing Email, Cloud Server, Firewall, Router Device, and Scheduled Task to the AttackPathToolbar component
Implement drag-and-drop functionality for the six security icons so users can drag them from the toolbar and drop them into the attack path diagram canvas
Update the icon type definitions in AttackPathToolbar to include the six new security icon types: backdoor, phishing, cloud-server, firewall, router, and scheduled-task

new_feature_requests.summary: Add horizontal toolbar with 6 draggable Lucide React icons (Backdoor/Virus, Phishing Email, Cloud Server, Firewall, Router Device, Scheduled Task) for attack path diagram
Ensure dragged security icons integrate with existing AttackPathCanvas functionality including selection, movement, connection, and state management

projectName: Add draggable icon toolbar with 6 security icons
